description: A Jupyter Notebook containing Python code for processing PDFs, generating embeddings with Google PaLM, and performing question-answering on company policy documents. It includes code for reading PDFs, text splitting, embedding generation, and querying a language model.

methods.name: split_text
methods.description: Splits raw text into chunks of specified size with overlap, suitable for token processing.

methods.name: similarity_search
methods.description: Performs similarity search on the document store to find relevant documents for a query.

methods.name: run
methods.description: Executes the question-answering chain with provided input documents and question.
